subject: WM-0158 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified ADR-0014 is implemented through UiDeltaPayload.playable with public protocol-owned PlayableProjectionV1 types, Web uses only package-root public APIs via readWebPlayableProjection, sim-worker maps from authoritative PlayableReadModel, reliable CommandResult/SaveReady/fatal delivery remains separate, worker-smoke and focused checks pass, and no save/release/telemetry/account promise was introduced.
